overall.description: First-person gameplay footage moving through a tropical Caribbean-style covered plaza with red wooden columns and stone architecture. The camera approaches two NPCs cleaning the tiled floor - one sweeping and one scrubbing - before moving toward a wooden stage structure. Bright midday sunlight creates strong shadows through the open-air pavilion.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market plaza entrance with stone walls

events.description: passing through stone gate into covered plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through stone entrance into the covered plaza, passing benches and columns

entered.detail: rough stone block wall with metal fence sections marking the plaza boundary
wooden beam roof structure with red painted supports providing partial shade
thick red painted wooden support pillars holding up the roof structure
white metal park benches with wooden slats arranged in the plaza
string of triangular festival flags in green, yellow, and red hanging from roof

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a stone wall entrance and moves into a covered tropical plaza. The camera passes through a gateway with rough stone pillars into a semi-shaded area with red wooden columns supporting a wooden roof. Metal benches line the walkway as colorful pennant banners hang overhead, suggesting a market or festival space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered dining area with scattered tables

events.description: two cleaning workers become visible in the plaza center ahead

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the plaza between tables and chairs, approaching the cleaning workers

notable_agents.action: woman standing with broom, beginning to sweep the tiled floor
man kneeling on ground with scrub brush and bucket, cleaning the tiles

entered.detail: large reddish-brown clay pots containing green leafy plants placed near columns
raised wooden platform with roof structure visible in the distance beyond the plaza
round glass-top tables with metal frames and matching chairs arranged for dining

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered plaza, the camera passes between metal dining tables and large terracotta planters. Two NPC cleaning workers become visible ahead - one standing with a broom and another kneeling to scrub the floor. The wooden roof now spans directly overhead while a stage structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with active cleaning workers

events.description: camera begins circling around the two cleaning workers to observe from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the two cleaning workers, observing their sweeping and scrubbing actions from multiple angles

notable_agents.action: woman sweeping the concrete tiles with a push broom, moving methodically across the plaza
man kneeling and scrubbing the floor with a brush, wearing a straw hat and beige shirt

entered.detail: silver metal bucket placed on the ground near the kneeling worker

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around two NPC workers cleaning the plaza floor - a woman sweeping with a broom and a man scrubbing on his knees with a brush and bucket. The movement reveals the wooden stage structure shifting from background to left side as the camera orbits the workers, showcasing the red column architecture and tiled ground from various angles.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stage pavilion with mountain backdrop

events.description: moving past the cleaning workers toward the raised wooden stage structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden stage structure, leaving the cleaning workers behind and approaching the steps

entered.detail: concrete steps leading up to the raised wooden stage platform
decorative lights strung along the edge of the stage roof
large rocky hill with tropical vegetation visible behind the stage

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves past the cleaning workers toward a prominent wooden stage structure with steps leading up to a platform. The camera approaches the stage where colorful string lights hang from the roof beams, and a rocky mountain formation becomes visible in the background. The plaza roof transitions from overhead to the right side as the camera faces the open stage area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stone gateway into a vibrant, covered tropical plaza that culminates at an open wooden stage. It begins by passing through rough stone pillars into a semi-shaded walkway characterized by red wooden columns, metal benches, and colorful overhead pennant banners. As the camera moves deeper into the plaza, the scene shifts past dining tables and terracotta planters toward two cleaning workers, one sweeping and one scrubbing the tiled floor. The camera then orbits these workers, causing the surrounding red architecture to rotate in view before the wooden stage structure shifts from the background to the left. Finally, the movement pushes past the workers toward the stage steps and hanging string lights, as the overhead roof recedes to the right to reveal a rocky mountain formation in the distance.
